feature.name: WebNN
feature.creator: ericde@google.com
feature.summary: WebNN seeks to enable web applications and frameworks to take advantage of native operating system services for machine learning and the underlying hardware capabilities available on a user's computer to implement consistent, efficient, and reliable ML experiences on the web.
